scripts.check: node --check scripts/google_earth_crop_core.mjs && node --check scripts/crop_google_earth.mjs && node --check scripts/crop_csv_batch.mjs && node --check scripts/benchmark_google_earth_crop.mjs && node --check scripts/ocr_date_label.mjs && node --check assets/templates/csv_batch_runner.template.mjs && node --check assets/templates/normalize_csv.template.mjs && python3 -c "import py_compile; py_compile.compile('assets/templates/gif_from_images.template.py', cfile='/tmp/google-earth-crop-gif-template.pyc', doraise=True)" && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); function check(file, rows){ const lines=fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8').trim().split(/\r?\n/); const header=lines[0].split(','); for (const col of ['query_date','output_name']) if (!header.includes(col)) throw new Error(file+' missing '+col); const hasCoords=header.includes('lat')&&header.includes('lon'); const hasAddress=header.includes('address'); if (!hasCoords && !hasAddress) throw new Error(file+' missing location columns'); if (lines.length !== rows+1) throw new Error(file+' must contain '+rows+' rows plus header'); } check('assets/test-data/coordinate-sample-10.csv',10); check('assets/test-data/address-sample-2.csv',2); check('assets/test-data/moorpark-date-ocr.csv',1); check('assets/test-data/blurry-historical-refresh.csv',3);" && python -m json.tool package.json >/dev/null && python -m json.tool evals/evals.json >/dev/null && python -m json.tool benchmarks/baseline-2026-06-10.json >/dev/null
scripts.install:playwright: npm install && npx playwright install chromium
scripts.eval:full: npm install && npx playwright install chromium && node scripts/benchmark_google_earth_crop.mjs --output benchmark-runs/us-10-coordinate
